title: Apexguard Auto Film: vectorize the AI-drafted master + two sub-brand marks into production SVGs and assemble a multi-size die-cut vinyl decal sheet on the supplied cut-line template
one_line_ask: Clean and de-skew Apexguard's three AI-drafted PPF/tint logo rasters, trace them into crisp production SVG masters, derive one-color knockouts for vinyl weeding, then assemble a multi-size die-cut vinyl decal/sticker sheet by binding the vector marks and the approved-sizes CSV into the client's authored cut-line template and exporting a press-ready PDF + SVG.

issues: Image appears to be 1:1 square crop rather than 1600x1000 (16:10) aspect ratio
Tilt is essentially imperceptible — may be sub-1deg rather than the specified ~2.5deg
Texture/noise on background is very subtle, borderline absent — minimal paper grain visible
Soft edges on letterforms are very mild, may need more pronounced halo for downstream fix-chain testing
Slightly soft edges and faint texture (acceptable per brief)
Tint bar bands could be slightly more visually distinct in tone for maximum print safety, but within brief's allowance
Tint bar bands could be slightly more distinct/higher contrast between the lightest and mid band
'TINT' label sits very close to the right edge of the wordmark rather than cleanly beneath 'APEXGUARD' — minor alignment quirk
Soft edge on the blue frame border consistent with AI export (acceptable per brief)
Slightly soft anti-aliased edges and faint noise (acceptable per brief for a source asset)
Mildly uneven lighting and very subtle tilt (acceptable per brief for a source asset)
No severe artifacts or composition issues
Shield glyph appears more rounded/traditional shield shape rather than strictly hexagonal as specified
Lockup appears essentially level/horizontal rather than showing the specified ~3-degree counter-clockwise rotation
Text weight hierarchy is acceptable but 'SHIELD' could be slightly more differentiated in size relative to 'APEXGUARD'
Very minor: inner shield core reads as dark charcoal rather than fully matte black, though within acceptable source-file tolerance

assets.name: decal_sheet_template.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
